description: Letter from Yosef ha-Kohen [b.] Shelomo ha-Shofeṭ and his son Yeshuʿa on behalf of the two congregations of Alexandria, addressed most likely to the community of Fustat. In Hebrew. Dating: first half of the 11th century. See Bodl. MS heb. a 3/28 (PGPID 19284) and related documents listed there.
description_he: מכתב בעברית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
